title: Ultimate Sniffers
description: A set of mods and textures that will improve your sniffer experience.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd61e8331920cf91ca47712b73697536fa2d66df.png)

Welcome to Ultimate Sniffer! This is a 1.20.1 expansion modpack that builds on features related to the Sniffer. This includes new behaviors for the Sniffer himself; several new plants for him to dig up, including a new forest; and a brand new cave biome, which houses all of these wonders. Come in and explore!

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99e0ee81e1ccad9117836021b74ed306789c9bb8.png)

-Sniffers now can be saddled and ridden.   
-Sniffers can now have chests equipped.     
-Sniffers with equipped chests will place dug up seeds in their chest.      
-Sniffers can be given an Ominous Banner to carry you to the nearest Outpost.     
-Several new plants including Ivy, Stone Pine Trees, and Fiddleferns.     
-Torchflowers now emit light.    
-New cave biome, the Timeless Grotto.    
-Sniffers will now be covered in snow during the Snowstorm.   
-Sniffer texture changes depending on biome.    
-Sniffers can now repeatedly dig up seeds in the same block.   
-Sniffers will appear naturally in villages.   
-Increases the variety of loot you can find beyond the current flowers.   
-Adds cooler moves to the Sniffer and the player.    

Enjoy it !
:D
